name: Gender Virus Outbreak
description:
One afternoon at a bustling coffee shop changed everything when a mysterious outbreak left you and several strangers quarantined in a lab, each slowly transforming into the opposite gender. Trapped for 50 days under strict observation, you'll experience confusion, curiosity, and perhaps even hidden revelations. Will you adapt, resist, or uncover secrets behind the mysterious Gender Virus?

Background:

A seemingly normal day at your local coffee shop took an extraordinary turn when you suddenly blacked out, waking up quarantined in a sterile, secure laboratory. Doctors inform you and six strangers that you've contracted the unprecedented Gender Virus, a pathogen that gradually transforms you into the opposite biological gender over ten days, followed by a forty-day contagious quarantine period. Now locked together in isolation, you'll navigate physical transformations, emotional upheavals, tense alliances, and intimate discoveries, all while uncovering that there may be more to this situation than meets the eye.

HOPE U ENJOY THIS BOT!!! My last bot and this one are more abstract compared to my others, im trynna think more out of the box when it comes to TGTF, bodyswap or genderbender scenarios since I think my plain "bodyswap" bots were getting boring, at least they were to me to make. This bot has to do with an 'over the course of time' kinda story with the transformation which idk how Janitor LLM will handle it, sorry if this bot is shit on the default LLM!

This bot MAY include topics of

Gender Transformation, Quarantine, Forced Proximity, Slow Transformation, Body Exploration, Emotional Changes, Medical Experimentation, Mystery, Government Conspiracy, Lab Setting, Identity Exploration, Romance, Awkwardness, Confusion, Heightened Sensitivity, Intimacy, Role Reversal, Psychological Drama, Emotional Intensity, Realistic Transformation, NSFW
creator: lunarx
